titleStmt.title: SII 30.177: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 177. (A.R. No. 255 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the east wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year •••: 11th c. A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. The inscription is built in between the lines 3 & 4 and at the end. It records the provision made for feeding 100 Śrīvaishṇava pilgrims in the hall named Jananātha maṇḍapa who were going to the temple of Tirumala and returning after taking sacred bath (tīrtamāḍal) on newmoon days, on the day of Tiruvōṇam festival in the month of Puraṭṭāsi and six days festival in the month of Aipasi. It could be inferred that this record belonged to the Vishṇu temple i.e. Sōḻakēraḷa-viṇṇagar of this village [see no. 250] since it pertained to Śrivaishṇavas, Tiruvōṇam, Tirumala etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum porcceyap pāvaiyuñ cīrttaṉiccelviyun taṉperun teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyar Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭun tuṭarvaṉa velippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matuḷkoḷḷippaākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
keraḷan muṟaimaiyiṉ cūṭuṅ kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyun ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ ciṉavil lirupattorukālaraicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāman melvaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻiymika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan ṉaḷapparum pukaḻoṭum pañca
ppaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil vaṇkīrtti Ātinakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉṟol kulattintirataṉai viḷaiyamar kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulatanak kukaiyuñRead- kuvaiciṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurarcer naṟ kocalaināṭu n=tammapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇu
yaṟu nāḻikku nelliru tūṇikkuṟuṇi munnāḻiyum puḻukkukkaṟi yonṟukku nel Aiñāḻiyum miḷaku kaṟiyonṟukku nel Aiñāḻiyum puḷitta kaṟiyonṟukkup puḷiyuṭpaṭa nellukkuṟuṇiyoru nāḻiyum Ilaikkaṟikku nelliru nāḻiyum miḷakāḻakkukku nel nāṉāḻiyum Uppiru nāḻikku nel nāṉāḻiyum neyyuḻakkukku nelkkuṟuṇiyum mor patakkukku nelkkuṟuṇi yirunāḻiyuñ caṟkarai nāṟpalattukku nelkkuṟuṇiyum ve(ṟ)ṟuṅkāy nāṟpatukku nelk kuṟuṇiyum veṟṟilaip paṟṟiraṇṭukku nel nāṉāḻiyum Aṭuvānoruvaṉukku nelk kuṟuṇiyum Āka Amāvāsyai Onṟukku nelk kalane yeḻukuṟuṇi munnāḻiyāka Amāvāsyai panniraṇṭukku nelp pattonpatin kalane kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyun tiruveṅkaṭamalait tirtthamāṭap peruṅkūṭṭamāy vantu jananātan maṇṭapattuṇṇum śrīvaiṣṇavar ṉūṟṟuvarkkup perālarici nāḻiyuriyāka Arici kalane tūṇippatakkaṟu nāḻikku nel mukkalane yirutūṇippatakke munnāḻiyum payaṟu kuṟuṇikku nelppatakkum puḻukkuk kaṟiyonṟukku
nel mukkuṟuṇiyum miḷakukkaṟi yonṟukku nel mukkuṟuṇiyum puḷittakaṟiyonṟukkup puḷiyuṭpaṭa nelttūṇiyum Ilaikkaṟi yonṟukku nelkkuṟuṇiyum miḷaku muvuḻakkukku nel mukkuṟuṇiyum Uppuk kuṟuṇikku nelp patakkum ney yirunāḻikku nellirutuṇiyum mor kalattukku nel tūṇippatakkum puḷiṅkaṟikku morukku nel tūṇip patakkum caṟkaṟai Irupattiru palattukku nel tūṇiyum veṟuṅkāyiru nūṟṟukku nel Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum veṟṟilaip paṟṟeṭṭukku nelp patakkum Aṭuvāriruvarkku nel tūṇiyum cuṇṇāmpukku kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum viṟakiṭuvānoruvanukku nelppatakkum Ilaikkaṟiyiṭuvā noruvaṉukku nelp patakkum Āka nel Eṇkalaneyiru tūṇi munṉāḻiyum Ivarkaḷ tirttimāṭi mīṇṭuvantār śrīvaiṣṇavar ṉūṟṟuvarkku meṟpaṭiyākki nelleṇkalane yirutūṇi munṉāḻiyum puraṭṭātit tiruvoṇattināḷ tirttimāṭa vaṉta śrīvaiṣṇavar ṉūṟṟuvarkku meṟpaṭiyākki nelleṇkalane yirutūṇi munṉāḻiyum Aippacit tirunāḷilt tiruviḻāveḻun tirunāḷāṟil nāḷonṟiluṇṇum śrīvai
Digital edition of SII 30.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
